name: Easy Cornbread
recipeIngredient: 2 large eggs or 4 egg whites or equivalent egg substitute
1/2 cup shredded reduced fat Cheddar cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a bowl and stir until just moistened.
2. Pour the mixture into a lightly greased 13" x 9" x 2-inch pan.
3. Bake at 400°F for 17-20 minutes or until golden brown.
